lines: Callum sits top of the sweepstake after France dismantled Norway 4-1 — yes, his France beat his Norway, the absolute jammy cunt is basically competing against himself and winning.

Ellis, you poor fuck — New Zealand just got absolutely battered 5-1 by Belgium, Paraguay are going nowhere fast, and Argentina still need to beat Jordan today to even give you a sniff of relevance in this thing.

Big day for Carter, who has Algeria, Colombia AND DR Congo all in action — either he cleans up and storms back into contention, or he remains a solid 9 points off the lead like the perennial bottler we all know he is.

The Colombia vs Portugal fixture is the standout one to watch — Carter and The Foreman want Colombia to win, Butters desperately needs Portugal to finally wake up and string a performance together, and someone in this group is going to end the day absolutely fuming.

Keep your eyes on Panama vs England — Al's Panama are winless and dead, but if they somehow nick a result, Carter and Wilmot will have achieved the rare feat of losing to a country whose entire GDP is a canal.
